Hero.fullstack: Senior FullStack Developer | AI-Driven Software Engineer
Hero.specialized: Specialized in React, React Native & Node.js
Hero.description: With over 6 years of experience, I focus on performance, scalability, and creating memorable experiences. Currently, I enhance my development workflow through AI to deliver high-quality solutions with agility.

About.title: 👨‍💻 About me
About.intro: I am a Full Stack Developer with a strong focus on Web and Mobile applications, specialized in React.js and React Native, with a focus on performance and scalability.
About.aiSubtitle: I integrate Artificial Intelligence into my workflow to accelerate deliveries and elevate technical quality:
About.outro: I work end-to-end, from intuitive interface design in Figma to robust API construction with Node.js (TS). Solid experience with SQL/NoSQL databases and DevOps/CI-CD practices with Docker.
About.quote: I believe the combination of solid engineering and AI is the modern developer's competitive edge.

invoice.desc: 💼 A complete Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) and business management SaaS. Helping thousands of entrepreneurs professionalize their operations with professional invoicing, CRM, and real-time financial reporting. 🚀

play.sub: Premium IPTV Player for Apple Ecosystem
play.desc: 📺 The definitive IPTV experience built exclusively for Apple devices. Seamless iCloud synchronization, zero data collection, and native performance for iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple TV. 🍎

ta.desc: 🏋️‍♂️ I'm excited to share an app that is transforming the way you train and interact with your clients. 🌟

habits.desc: After NLW, I decided to develop more features for this daily habit tracking app. I implemented the social login screen, added notifications, and incorporated some animations that made the app much more personalized.
